name: Irish Stew
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut lamb into 1-inch cubes, removing pieces of fat.
2. Wipe meat with damp cloth.
3. Layer vegetables and meat in a 3-quart lightly greased casserole dish, beginning and ending with vegetables. Lightly salt and pepper each layer.
4. Add chicken broth and bay leaf; cover tightly.
5. Bake at 325°F for 2 hours.
